name: System Architectural Design
purpose: The purpose is to establish an analyzed system architecture, comprising static and dynamic aspects, consistent with the system requirements.

outcomes.text: A system architecture is designed including a definition of the system elements with their behavior, their interfaces, their relationships, and their interactions.
The system architecture is analyzed against defined criteria, and special characteristics are identified.
Consistency and bidirectional traceability are established between system architecture and system requirements.
The agreed system architecture and the special characteristics are communicated to all affected parties.

basePractices.title: Specify static aspects of the system architecture
basePractices.description: Specify and document the static aspects of the system architecture with respect to the functional and non-functional system requirements, including external interfaces and a defined set of system elements with their interfaces and relationships.

basePractices.title: Specify dynamic aspects of the system architecture
basePractices.description: Specify and document the dynamic aspects of the system architecture with respect to the functional and non-functional system requirements including the behavior of the system elements and their interaction in different system modes. mechanical components, processing times of ECUs, and signal propagation times of bus systems. aspects, consistent with the system requirements. | | | behavior, their interfaces, their relationships, and their interactions. 2) The system architecture is analyzed against defined criteria, and special characteristics are identified. 3) Consistency and bidirectional traceability are established between system architecture and system requirements. 4) The agreed system architecture and the special characteristics are communicated to all affected parties. | | | static aspects of the system architecture with respect to the functional and non-functional system requirements, including external interfaces and a defined set of system elements with their interfaces and relationships. | | | dynamic aspects of the system architecture with respect to the functional and non-functional system requirements including the behavior of the system elements and their interaction in different system modes. mechanical components, processing times of ECUs, and signal propagation times of bus systems. | | |

basePractices.title: Analyze system architecture
basePractices.description: Analyze the system architecture regarding relevant technical design aspects related to the product lifecycle, and to support project management regarding project estimates, and derive special characteristics for non-software system elements.
